svg.aria-label: Interactive gradient-descent primer: a ball descends a one-dimensional loss bowl in eight discrete steps. A draggable slider sets the learning rate — the step size — moving between four regimes: too small (the ball crawls and never reaches the bottom), about right (it settles at the minimum), too large (it overshoots and bounces across the bowl), and way too large (each step lands higher and the ball leaves the bowl). A readout reports the current learning rate and regime.
svg.text: a ball rolls down a loss bowl in 8 discrete steps
teal dot = one step · red ball = where it ends
one weight’s value — the bottom of the bowl is the loss minimum
learning rate 0.30 — about right: settles at the bottom
